CheckTitle: 检查RDS DB clusters have copy tags to 快照 enabled
Description: 检查RDS DB clusters have copy tags to 快照 enabled, Aurora instances do not support this feature at instance level so those who are clustered will be scan by this check.
Risk: If RDS 集群s are not configured to copy tags to 快照, it could lead to compliance issues as the 快照 will not inherit necessary metadata such as environment, owner, or purpose tags. This could result in inefficient tracking and management of RDS resources and their 快照.

Recommendation.Text: 确保the `CopyTagsToSnapshot` setting已启用 for all RDS 集群s to propagate cluster tags to their 快照 for improved tracking and compliance.
